Event: Titanic Excavation - Mar 2025
Event Date: 25/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR245
Wrath of the Gargoyle Plate Mail

Once in a while, the unit gains a shield that absorbs 55% damage of any type for 5 sec. When the shield wears off, the armor wearer casts a shield on themself and 2 nearby allies that absorbs damage equal to 30% of the damage absorbed during the first shield. The second shield absorbs damage of any type and exists for up to 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
